ab: nokakyab am, nimangay ko a ataoen si akay do Jimowrod.
ch: 昨天，我去紅頭部落探望爺爺。
en: Yesterday, I went to visit my grandpa in the tribe.

ab: ko mownay rana ji nimacita si akay, ko ikapaw iya.
ch: 我很久沒有見到爺爺了，我很想念他。
en: We haven’t seen each other for a long time and I miss him a lot.

ab: na ka pakacita jiaken ni akay am, na pakanen yaken so somon, na ka pinom jiaken so asoy no anioy.
ch: 爺爺一看到我，就請我吃西瓜，請我喝椰子汁。
en: As soon as grandpa saw me, he invited me to eat watermelon and drink coconut juice.

ab: ya maganinam o na nimoa ni akay a somon, ya teyapia kanen.
ch: 爺爺種的西瓜很甜，真的很好吃。
en: The watermelon grown by grandpa is very sweet and really delicious.

ab: ko ikakey o asoy no anioy, ta ya manao a inomen.
ch: 我也喜歡椰子汁，也很好喝。
en: I also like coconut juice, it’s tasted good too.

ab: ya miigen o araw am, ko sidongen si akes a ya manotong.
ch: 中午的時候，我幫奶奶一起煮飯。
en: At noon, I cooked lunch with my grandma.

ab: ya aro o na nipansahadan ni akes a iyakan namen, ya mian so among a ka no manok a ka no piniow a ka no peyret.
ch: 奶奶煮了很豐盛的佳餚，有魚、有雞、有南瓜、還有田螺。
en: Grandma cooked a big lunch, including fish, chicken, pumpkin, and river snails.

ab: namen teyka koman am, namen mangay mangotod so voong no balangbang.
ch: 吃完餐後，我們去摘過溝菜野菜。
en: After lunch, we went to the vegetable garden to pick vegetables.

ab: ya aro o wakay a ka no soli a ka no vizaoz a da nivaon jiaken nira akay.
ch: 爺爺和奶奶拿了很多地瓜、芋頭和香瓜送給我帶回家。
en: Grandma brought me a lot of sweet potatoes, taro and melon, and asked me to take them home.

ab: ko taitaiden rana sira akay am, ko maniring am “sira akay kong, akes kong, cia’a ta sipisa am mai ko a omatao jinio an.”
ch: 我跟他們道別時，我說：「阿公阿嬤，沒關係，我下次會再來看您們。」
en: I said goodbye to them and said I’d see them next time.
